title: scleranthus annuus
intro: Scleranthus annuus, also known as annual knawel, is a plant species within the carnation family. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of scleranthus annuus include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and urinary tract issues, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of scleranthus annuus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to support women's health and alleviate various symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances.
